analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will host COP15 in Kunming and is ready to work with all parties to ensure positive outcomes. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral) – not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – yes: portrays China as cooperative, engaging in multilateralism, and contributing to a global public good (biodiversity conference) with an emphasis on working with all parties for positive outcomes. CH3 (epic history) – not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system and values, domestically) – not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – no explicit claim of domestic achievements or leadership success beyond hosting the conference. CH6 (interesting culture/nature) – not a cultural or tourism-focused message; mentions location but not promoting culture/heritage. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
